content.text:
URGENT anomaly detected: messaging pipeline instability is active now.

- Repeating Telegram channel errors (`409 Conflict: terminated by other getUpdates request`) every ~30–90s indicate concurrent bot polling sessions; this can cause missed/delayed inbound support messages and duplicate-processing risk.
- Gateway remote connection is failing with `pairing required` / close `1008` to `https://api.truthjblue.dev`, which can break remote-control/orchestration paths until re-paired.

Time-sensitive impact: support alerting and inbox responsiveness may be degraded right now.
